data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for retainage tracking, specifically holding back 10% until completion. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The only related information is a narrative description of the invoicing process, which does not serve as sufficient evidence to confirm the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming retainage tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for retainage tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify retainage tracking functionality.
